# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest major version receives security updates.

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| v1.2.x  | :white_check_mark: |
| < v1.2  | :x:       |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please report any security vulnerability directly to Kushal Khadka at kushalkhadkaa@gmail.com instead of opening a public issue. We will investigate the issue and address it in the next maintenance release.
